verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There will never be another who will love me like You There will never be another who could hold me, mold me There will never be another who could love me purely No there will never be another who has loved me like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I know that there will never be another love Who could ever be the love that You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cause You had so much to lose but still You gave it up for Your scars- But that's the way you are And if I spent my life attending universities, Educated in the wisdom of men And if I could even quote a guy like Socrates, even then I couldn't comprehend

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I know I'll never understand this mystery If I live to be a hundred and three How You died to live the love You give to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There will never be another who has loved me like You
